hero.subtitle: Cryptocurrency
hero.description: Discover innovative blockchain solutions that revolutionize how we think about digital currency and everyday activities.

intro.title: Introducing MileCoin
intro.description: The world's first cryptocurrency that rewards your everyday travel and movement
intro.heading: Mine Cryptocurrency with Every Mile You Travel
intro.content: MileCoin introduces a groundbreaking approach to cryptocurrency mining. Instead of energy-intensive computing, mine coins simply by traveling, walking, driving, or moving. Every mile you cover contributes to your MileCoin wallet.

steps.1: Travel or move around in your daily activities
steps.2: Our app tracks your distance automatically
steps.3: Earn MileCoins based on miles traveled
steps.4: Trade or use your earned MileCoins

cta.title: Ready to Start Mining with Miles?
cta.description: Join thousands of users who are already earning MileCoins through their daily activities

about-us.title: About YANA Holidays
about-us.subtitle: Your trusted B2B travel partner for seamless booking experiences

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: YANA Holidays is a specialized B2B travel platform designed to support travel agencies and businesses with access to flights, hotels, and travel services through a trusted global network of suppliers and partners. We are committed to delivering a seamless booking experience, competitive travel solutions, and dedicated customer support that helps our partners operate efficiently and serve their customers with confidence.

strongPartnerships.title: Strong Partnerships
strongPartnerships.description: The name YANA is inspired by the phrase 'You Are Not Alone', reflecting our belief that strong partnerships and reliable support are essential in the travel industry. This commitment drives everything we do, from the technology we build to the service we provide.

industryExpertise.title: Industry Expertise
industryExpertise.description: At YANA Holidays, we combine industry expertise, trusted partnerships, and customer-focused support to help our clients grow, succeed, and create better travel experiences.

services.title: Flight Bookings
services.description: Access to competitive airfare from a global network of trusted suppliers

services.title: Hotel Reservations
services.description: Extensive hotel inventory with competitive rates worldwide

services.title: Travel Services
services.description: Comprehensive travel solutions tailored to your business needs

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.description: We combine industry expertise, trusted partnerships, and customer-focused support to help our partners grow, succeed, and create better travel experiences.

partnerSupport.title: Partner Support
partnerSupport.description: Dedicated support to help your business thrive

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Seamless booking experience through innovative tech

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Commitment to quality in everything we do

cta.title: Ready to Partner with Us?
cta.description: Join our network of travel agencies and businesses benefiting from our B2B travel solutions

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.subtitle: YANA Holidays is committed to protecting the privacy of its users and safeguarding their personal data in accordance with the applicable laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, including the Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). By using the YANA Holidays platform, you consent to the collection, use, and processing of your personal data as described in this Privacy Policy.
PrivacyPolicy.cardDescription: We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

informationCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationCollect.content: We may collect various types of information, including:
points: Full name.
Company or travel agency name.
Phone number.
Email address.
Account and login information.
Booking and transaction details.
Billing and payment information.
Technical information such as IP address, browser type, operating system, and usage data.

howWeCollect.title: 2. How We Collect Information
points: Account registration and profile creation.
Use of the Platform and its services.
Communication with us via email or other contact channels.
Cookies and similar technologies.

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Information
howWeUse.content: Your information may be used for the following purposes:
points: Creating and managing user accounts.
Processing bookings and providing services.
Delivering customer support and technical assistance.
Communicating with users regarding accounts and services.
Improving platform performance and user experience.
Complying with legal and regulatory obligations.
Preventing fraud and enhancing platform security.

dataSharing.title: 4. Sharing of Information
dataSharing.content: Personal data may be shared when necessary with:
points: Airlines.
Hotels.
Suppliers and service partners.
Payment service providers.
Governmental or regulatory authorities when required by law.
We do not sell or rent personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, loss, or misuse. While we take reasonable security measures, no method of data transmission or storage over the Internet can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by applicable laws and regulatory obligations.

userRights.title: 7. Data Subject Rights
userRights.content: In accordance with applicable laws in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, you may have the right to:
points: Know what personal data we process about you.
Request access to your personal data.
Request correction or updating of inaccurate information.
Request deletion of personal data where permitted by law.
Withdraw consent for data processing where legally applicable.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.content: The Platform may use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze performance, and enhance services. Users may control or disable cookies through their browser settings; however, doing so may affect certain Platform functionalities.

externalLinks.title: 9. External Links
externalLinks.content: The Platform may contain links to third-party websites or services. YANA Holidays is not responsible for the privacy practices, policies, or content of such external websites, and users are encouraged to review their respective privacy policies.

policyChanges.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
policyChanges.content: YANA Holidays reserves the right to amend or update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any updates will be published on the Platform along with the revised effective date.

contactUs.title: 11. Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions, requests, or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of personal data, please contact us through the official contact channels provided on the Contact Us page or email us at info@yanaholidays.com.

PrivacyPolicy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please don't hesitate to contact us.

TermsConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
TermsConditions.agreementNotice: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using the platform. By accessing, registering, or using any of the services provided through the platform, you acknowledge and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
TermsConditions.cardDescription: Please review the following terms carefully. These terms govern your use of the YANA Holidays platform and services.

definitions.title: 1. Definitions
definitions.content: For the purposes of these Terms and Conditions, the following definitions shall apply:
points: Platform: YANA Holidays and all related websites, systems, applications, and services.
User: Any individual, travel agency, company, or entity accessing or using the Platform.
Services: All flight bookings, hotel reservations, travel-related products, and services made available through the Platform.
Service Provider: Airlines, hotels, suppliers, and partners providing services through the Platform.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
eligibility.content: The User confirms that they have the legal capacity and authority required to use the Platform and enter into commercial transactions, and that all information provided is accurate, complete, and up to date.

accountRegistration.title: 3. Account Registration
accountRegistration.content: Users must register an account to access certain features of the Platform.
points: Users must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials.
Sharing account access with unauthorized parties is prohibited.
YANA Holidays reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account in cases of suspected unauthorized use, fraud, or violation of these Terms.

useOfPlatform.title: 4. Use of the Platform
useOfPlatform.content: Users agree to use the Platform only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not compromise the security, functionality, or availability of the Platform.
points: Using the Platform in violation of applicable laws and regulations is prohibited.
Attempting unauthorized access to systems, accounts, or data is strictly forbidden.
Uploading or transmitting harmful, fraudulent, or unlawful content is not allowed.
Manipulating bookings, prices, or services in any unauthorized manner is prohibited.

bookingsPricing.title: 5. Bookings and Pricing
bookingsPricing.content: All bookings made through the Platform are subject to specific terms and conditions.
points: All bookings are subject to availability at the time of confirmation.
Prices displayed on the Platform may change until the booking is successfully confirmed.
Airlines, hotels, and other service providers may apply their own terms and conditions.
Users are responsible for reviewing and verifying all booking details before confirmation.

amendmentsCancellationsRefunds.title: 6. Amendments, Cancellations, and Refunds
amendmentsCancellationsRefunds.content: Amendments, cancellations, and refund requests are subject to the policies and conditions of the relevant Service Provider and may be subject to additional fees or charges.

travelAgenciesCorporate.title: 7. Travel Agencies and Corporate Users
travelAgenciesCorporate.content: The Platform is intended for authorized travel agencies and corporate users. Additional terms apply:
points: Users are fully responsible for all activities conducted through their accounts.
Users must provide accurate booking information and service details to their clients.
Users are solely responsible for managing their commercial relationships with their customers.
YANA Holidays reserves the right to suspend or terminate access to the Platform in cases of policy violations or misuse.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All intellectual property rights related to the Platform, including trademarks, logos, content, software, designs, and materials, are owned by or licensed to YANA Holidays and may not be copied, reproduced, distributed, or used without prior written consent.

limitationOfLiability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content: YANA Holidays shall not be liable for:
points: Flight delays, cancellations, schedule changes, or service disruptions caused by airlines.
Changes, cancellations, or service issues related to hotels or other suppliers.
Events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, governmental actions, technical failures, or force majeure events.
Any indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of the Platform or its Services.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content: Users agree to indemnify and hold harmless YANA Holidays, its affiliates, employees, and partners from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, costs, or expenses arising from their breach of these Terms or misuse of the Platform.

amendmentsToTerms.title: 11. Amendments to the Terms
amendmentsToTerms.content: YANA Holidays reserves the right to modify or update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Continued use of the Platform following any updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

suspensionTermination.title: 12. Suspension and Termination
suspensionTermination.content: YANA Holidays may suspend, restrict, or terminate access to the Platform at its sole discretion if a User violates these Terms or if such action is required for legal, security, or operational reasons.

governingLawJurisdiction.title: 13. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLawJurisdiction.content: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

contactInformation.title: 14. Contact Information
contactInformation.content: For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us through the official contact channels provided on the 'Contact Us' page or email us at info@tayyran.com.

TermsConditions.importantNoticeDescription: These Terms and Conditions constitute a legally binding agreement between you and YANA Holidays. By using our platform, you agree to comply with all the terms outlined above.

hero.headline: MileCoin
hero.description: Experience the first digital loyalty currency that rewards your bookings and interactions. Every journey brings you closer to exclusive benefits and savings.

whatIsMileCoin.title: What is MileCoin?
whatIsMileCoin.description: MileCoin is a digital loyalty currency within the Tayaran app, designed to reward users for:
whatIsMileCoin.value: MileCoin isn't just points - it's real value that reduces travel costs

gold.name: Gold
gold.features: Best prices + Exclusive offers + Premium support

platinum.name: Platinum
platinum.features: Maximum value + Major discounts + VIP benefits

points.value: Increased order value through paid memberships
points.repeat: Repeat purchases due to loyalty program

reasons.value: Every trip returns value to you

strengthsList.closer: Each booking brings you closer to bigger discounts
strengthsList.convert: Don't waste your money... convert it to MileCoin
strengthsList.cheaper: Travel becomes more affordable over time

messagesList.travelReturn: Travel and return with a discount
messagesList.worthReward: Tayaran... because travel deserves a reward

branding.fullDescription: Tayaran isn't just a booking app - it's a smart travel experience that rewards you every step of the way, from search to return.
